duplicateIdentifierChecks.tlua(209,5): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'set'.
duplicateIdentifierChecks.tlua(209,15): error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'value'.
duplicateIdentifierChecks.tlua(209,20): error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
duplicateIdentifierChecks.tlua(209,22): error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.


==== duplicateIdentifierChecks.tlua (370 errors) ====
    // Every member declaration in the following should produce a duplicate identifier error.
    
    interface I1 {
        get x(): number;
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        get x(): number;
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
    }
    
    interface I2 {
        set x(value: number);
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        set x(value: number);
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
    }
    
    interface I3 {
        get x(): number;
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        set x(value: number);
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        get x(): number;
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
    }
    
    interface I4 {
        set x(value: number);
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        get x(): number;
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        set x(value: number);
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
    }
    
    interface I5 {
        get x(): number;
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        x: number;
        ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        set x(value: number);
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
    }
    
    interface I6 {
        set x(value: number);
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        x: number;
        ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        get x(): number;
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
    }
    
    interface I7 {
        get x(): number;
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        x(): number;
        ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        set x(value: number);
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
    }
    
    interface I8 {
        set x(value: number);
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        x(): number;
        ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
        get x(): number;
            ~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'x'.
    }
    
    declare class C1 {
    ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'declare'.
            ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
            ~~~~~

                  ~~

        ~~~

            ~

               ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                 ~~~~~~

!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
    }
    
    local o6 = {
        set x(value: number) { },
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'set'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
            ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
              ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'value'.
                   ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                     ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                             ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
        x = 0,
        get x() { return 0 }
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'get'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
            ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
                ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                  ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
    }
    
    local o7 = {
        get x() { return 0 },
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'get'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
            ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
                ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                  ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
        x() { return 0 },
        ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
              ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
        set x(value: number) { }
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'set'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
            ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
              ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'value'.
                   ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                     ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                             ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
    }
    
    local o8 = {
        set x(value: number) { },
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'set'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
            ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
              ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'value'.
                   ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                     ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                             ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
        x() { return 0 },
        ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
              ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
        get x() { return 0 }
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'get'.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
            ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
                ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                  ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
    }
    
    local foo = "foo"
    
    interface I10 {
        get [foo](): number;
        [foo]: number;
        set [foo](value: number);
    }
    
    interface I11 {
        get [foo](): number;
        foo: number;
        set [foo](value: number);
    }
    
    interface I12 {
        get foo(): number;
        set [foo](value: number);
        set foo(value: number);
    }
    
    interface I13 {
        foo: number;
        [foo]: number;
    }
    
    interface I14 {
        foo: number;
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'foo'.
        foo: number;
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2300: Duplicate identifier 'foo'.
        [foo]: number;
    }
    
    interface I15 {
        foo: number;
        [foo]: number;
        [foo]: number;
    }
    
    declare class C10 {
    ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'declare'.
            ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
            ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
                  ~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
                  ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'C10'.
        get [foo](): number;
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'get'.
                   ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                     ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
        [foo]: number;
        ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
         ~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
             ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
               ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
        set [foo](value: number);
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'set'.
                  ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'value'.
                       ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                         ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
    }
    
    declare class C11 {
    ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'declare'.
            ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
            ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
                  ~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
                  ~~~

        ~

         ~~~

            ~

             ~

               ~~~~~~

                   ~

                     ~~~~~~

        set [foo](value: number);

                       ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                         ~~~~~~

    }
    
    declare class C12 {
    ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'declare'.
            ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
            ~~~~~

                  ~~~

                  ~~~

                   ~

                     ~~~~~~

        set [foo](value: number);
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'set'.
                  ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'value'.
                       ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                         ~~~~~~

        [foo]: number;
        ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
         ~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
             ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
               ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
    }
    
    local sym = Symbol();
                ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'Symbol'.
    
    interface I20 {
        get [sym](): number;
        [sym]: number;
        set [sym](value: number);
    }
    
    declare class C20 {
    ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'declare'.
            ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
            ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
                  ~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
                  ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'C20'.
        get [sym](): number;
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'get'.
                   ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                     ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
        [sym]: number;
        ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
         ~~~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
            ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
             ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
               ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
        set [sym](value: number);
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'set'.
                  ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'value'.
                       ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ',' expected.
                         ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'number' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
    }
